parameters.query: SELECT brand_voice, niche, tone, writing_style FROM user_ai_config WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.body.user_id }}' LIMIT 1
SELECT system_prompt FROM operator_prompts WHERE component = 'content_subagent_blog' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO content_outputs (user_id, type, payload, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}',
  'blog',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, meta_description: $json.meta_description, body_markdown: $json.body_markdown, suggested_tags: $json.suggested_tags, readability_score: $json.readability_score, topic: $json.topic, target_keyword: $json.target_keyword }) }}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id
